$schema-note: Design tokens for Kaizen — REDESIGN 'Kaname' v1.0 (2026-06-28), trimmed 2026-07 (themes 4->2, accents 6->11 — see ADR in decisions.md). Single source of truth for colour/type/space. Flutter hardcodes these into app/lib/core/theme/. Key change vs v3: ACCENT is decoupled from THEME (11 curated accents chosen by user, either theme); ONE font (Geist) for the whole app and all themes; accessibility (high-contrast + text-size) are SETTINGS, not themes. Icons = Phosphor. Implementation spec + per-screen tracker: docs/REDESIGN-KANAME.md. Animations: docs/ANIMATIONS.md. Old v3 (5 baked-accent themes) is superseded.

icons.rule: default = regular (outline); active/selected = fill + accent. Sizes: 20 navbar/inline, 16 captions, 24 decorative ceiling. No Material defaults, no mixed sets.

font.rationale: One family for the entire app and all themes (variable, precise, premium). Numbers in Geist tabular/monospace figures for stable width in timers/counters.
font.fallback_warmth: Hanken Grotesk (sanctioned alternative if Geist unavailable in google_fonts at build time)
font.high_contrast_font: Atkinson Hyperlegible (ONLY when the high-contrast setting is on)
font.case: sentence case everywhere — NO ALL CAPS in labels/metas

spacing._note: base working unit = 16; phone screen padding = 24

radius._note: NO one-sided rounded borders. Cards 14-16, big cards/sheets 20, buttons/inputs 12.

border._note: default flat; hairline on cards. Shadows ONLY on bottom sheets + popovers (soft 0 8 24 / 12%).

motion.spring_note: overshoot/spring ONLY in joy moments (ring at 100%, day complete). Calorie/streak numbers update instantly, no animation.
motion.per_tab: Today=light card lift, Plan=lateral slide, Health=fluid fill, Diary=calmer.
motion.disable: ALL motion off under reduce-motion / high-contrast. Kai freezes neutral.

_content_max_width_note: readable centred column on expanded/large (>905dp). Phone = single column.

type_scale._note: Geist, weights 400/500 (600 rare). Sentence case. TZ role -> Flutter slot mapping below.

accents._note: 11 curated accents (2026-07: expanded from 6 — see ADR in decisions.md). User picks one (onboarding + Profile->Appearance), independent of theme. light = for Day theme; dark = for Night theme. tint = soft underlay, ink = text on tint, on = text/icon ON the accent fill. `on` is ADAPTIVE at build time (app/lib/core/theme/app_theme.dart _resolveOnAccent): whichever of white/near-black (#15140F) gives the higher WCAG contrast against the accent fill, with a guaranteed floor of CR>=4.5 (fill lightness is nudged via binary search if neither candidate reaches it — same helper as CustomThemePalette). For DARK themes: tint and ink are DERIVED at build time (tint = alphaBlend(accentDark @16%, surface); ink = accentDark).

categories._note: Fixed 8-colour palette for category dots/tags ONLY (10dp dot or thin chip). Theme-independent. Reuses the existing tag/subject concept (no schema change). Optional, OFF by default.

status._note: semantic, constant meaning across themes. success=done/ok, ember=overdue/urgent/overflow, danger=destructive. Provide per-brightness values for WCAG.

themes._note: Theme = surfaces + text + border ONLY. NO accent, NO font baked in. 2 themes (2026-07: Black/Calm removed as redundant with Night/Day + a curated accent — see ADR in decisions.md; old prefs values migrate via ThemeNotifier._migrateKey). Day is DEFAULT.

accessibility._note: Orthogonal SETTINGS layered on top of any theme+accent. NOT themes.

high_contrast.effects: text/borders -> AAA, accent contrast boosted, body letterSpacing +0.2, body lineHeight 1.60. Kai freezes neutral, motion off.
